creator: sdn@slip.net
text:
Do a make in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/lesstif and you get:
/bin/sh ../../libtool --mode=compile cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I../../include -I../../include/Moti
f-1.2  -I../../include/Motif-1.2  -I../../include  -I../../include  -I/usr/X11R6/include    -O -DNON
STANDARD_CONVERTERS -DLESSTIF_VERBOSE -c ToggleBG.c
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I../../include -I../../include/Motif-1.2 -I../../include/Motif-1.2 -I../
../include -I../../include -I/usr/X11R6/include -O -DNONSTANDARD_CONVERTERS -DLESSTIF_VERBOSE -c -fP
IC -DPIC ToggleBG.c
cc: Internal compiler error: program cc1 got fatal signal 11
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Do a make in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/lesstif
